title: stevia entreriensis
intro: Stevia entreriensis, also known as the sweet leaf, is a plant native to South America that belongs to the sunflower family. It is a natural sweetener derived from the leaves of this plant, which is approximately 200-300 times sweeter than sugar. The medicinal properties of Stevia entreriensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Stevia entreriensis include weight management, improved dental health, and reduced risk of heart disease, and herbal preparations often involve infusing the leaves in hot water or tea to create a sweet and flavorful drink.
